The '''L19a''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced by [[Surron StarTech]]. It was the initial production run of the [[Surronian L19 heavy freighter/Legends|Surronian L19 heavy freighter]] and was much more luxurious than the standard L19. It had a limited production run as was highly desirable. This meant prices for a genuine L19a could be four times the amount of a L19.

[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Aricos Dreleene]] owned a customized L19, named the ''[[Almost Authentic|First Edition]]''. He had modified this ship to resemble the more expensive L19a.
